Peppa Pig Wooden Puzzle Set for Toddlers Merchant video Peppa Pig Toys by abeec Wooden Puzzle Set Giant Cracker - Kids Cracker Sensory Flashcards Age Suitability 3+ Age Suitability 3+ Age Suitability 3+ Safety Standard CE / UKCA Certified Safety Standard CE / UKCA Certified Safety Standard CE / UKCA Certified Contents 4 x Wooden Puzzle Set Contents 1 x 48cm Christmas Cracker with colouring + activities Contents 16 x Peppa Pig Flashcards Use Case Early learning, tactile play, sensory development Use Case Fun novelty gift, stocking filler, table decoration Use Case Travel, learning, sensory development Four Fun Jigsaw Puzzles in One Set The Peppa Pig Wooden Puzzle Set is a delightful early learning puzzle collection designed especially for little hands. Featuring four charming wooden jigsaws, including three textured sensory puzzles and one 3D puzzle, this Peppa Pig toy brings fun, education, and tactile play together. Perfect for ages 3+, this engaging set helps children develop fine motor skills, problem-solving, and hand-eye coordination—all while playing with their favourite Peppa Pig characters. Crafted from durable, child-safe wood, each piece fits snugly into its board, giving toddlers the satisfaction of completing colourful scenes from Peppa’s world. Whether it’s family playtime, independent learning, or gifting for birthdays, this Peppa Pig jigsaw puzzle set combines fun and learning in one adorable box. Each Peppa Pig wooden puzzle helps toddlers learn to match shapes, colours, and characters while improving fine motor skills and problem-solving abilities. Designed for children aged 3 years and up, it supports early cognitive development through engaging, hands-on play. The large puzzle pieces are perfectly sized for small fingers, making this an ideal baby toy or first jigsaw puzzle for toddlers. This colourful wooden jigsaw puzzle board set includes 4 Peppa Pig-themed puzzles — three textured sensory puzzles and one 3D puzzle with raised wooden pieces for tactile exploration. Children can enjoy familiar Peppa scenes, from rainbow rides to playful family adventures, helping them build memory and recognition skills. The stackable rainbow puzzle adds an extra layer of interactive fun. Is the Peppa Pig wooden puzzle safe for toddlers? Yes! Each puzzle is made from non-toxic, child-safe wood and complies with CE and UKCA standards, ensuring peace of mind for parents and caregivers. How many puzzles are included? The set contains 4 Peppa Pig puzzles—3 textured sensory puzzles and 1 3D puzzle, each with bright, engaging designs for toddlers. What age group is this suitable for? It’s ideal for children aged 3 years and up, helping them learn through tactile, colourful play. Is the puzzle durable enough for everyday use? Absolutely. Made from thick wooden pieces, the puzzles are built to withstand frequent handling by little hands. Would this make a good Peppa Pig birthday gift? Yes! It’s an ideal gift for anyone looking for Peppa Pig toys for 3-year-olds, combining fun storytelling with developmental learning—perfect for gifting, birthdays or as a toddler stocking filler.
